data.description:
## AWS review-bot + auto-lander signing identity (Rebar Bot) via SSM

Both AWS bots should attribute as Rebar Bot. The auto-lander comments on WORK tickets
(non-exempt, `infra/autolander/loop.py:310`) so it MUST sign; the review-bot writes only
exempt types (`review_bot/voter.py:241,278`) so signing is for clean attribution.

- Add SSM SecureString `/rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key`; extend `infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh` to materialize it to a `0600` file (same pattern as `GERRIT_BOT_TOKEN`/`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, ADR-0008).
- Configure `identity.signing_key` (to that file) + bot identity (git email `joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com`) in both the reviewbot and autolander containers (`infra/compose`, `infra/Dockerfile.reviewbot`, `infra/Dockerfile.autolander`).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `/rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key` provisioned; `fetch-secrets.sh` materializes it `0600`; secret never in image/repo.
- [ ] Auto-lander merge-comments on work tickets are signed as Rebar Bot.
- [ ] Review-bot writes attribute to Rebar Bot (exempt, but attributed).
data.title: AWS review-bot + auto-lander signing identity (Rebar Bot) via SSM
